programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship is in Olbia, Sardinia, for the Grand Prix of Italy, featuring the Aquabike Jetski Division.

programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy is fly fishing for big tarpon with Charlie Johnson of Maverick Boat Group in Panama City, Florida.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep107: Humpback Whales In Danger
programme.desc: Singing louder than any animal on earth, humpback whales are famous for their haunting songs and jaw-dropping acrobatics. They were hunted to the brink of extinction until a moratorium on killing them was implemented in the 1960s. But after finally rebounding in numbers, whaling nations are exploring ways to re-open the hunt. In Antarctica, Japan is targeting minke, fin, and now... humpbacks

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep508: Life-On-The-Road with Longboard Surf Star Kassia Meador
programme.desc: Sports Adventure goes behind-the-scenes and explores life-on-the-road with longboard surf star Kassia Meador as she tames the waves and competes on the global professional surf circuit.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep404: Stand-Up Paddling the Azores
programme.desc: Mild weather and warm waters welcome Host Nikki Gregg as she stand-up paddles along the amazing coastlines that draw paddlers and adventurers to the Azores. She also visits crystal clear volcanic lakes, world-class surf spots and stunning coastal communities.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep104: Drinking Water + The Human Connection
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Blue World Ep404: Shipwrecks Turned Into Artificial Reefs + Freediving
programme.desc: Blue World visits shipwrecks in Florida to see how they turn into artificial reefs. Then Blue World’s host learns to freedive with Karol Meyer…a world-record freediver.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Kayak Salmon Fishing vs BBQ
programme.desc: Mike takes a good friend, and Professional firearms instructor/writer/photographer, out salmon fishing and then they head to check out Andy's hobby of competitive BBQ! Don't miss what these two cook up in this episode!

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Eversince
programme.desc: Can you remember the moment you knew you were hooked on snowboarding? 'Eversince' is a film about the first time, and chasing the unforgettable feeling every time after. Featuring: Lucas Debari, Jason Robinson, Keegan Valaika, Lizard King, Manuel Diaz, Bode Merrill, Nicolas Müller, Fredi Kalbermatten, Cale Zima, Brandon Cocard.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 1
programme.desc: Your friends at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 2
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 3
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 01
programme.desc: Kimmy Fasani is a world class athlete, a loving mother, a natural leader, and a true champion of women in professional snowboarding. In Episode 1 of her Microdose series, we learn where Fasani’s glorious story begins. Featuring Shannon Dunn, Donna Carpenter, Hana Beaman, Gabe Taylor and Ryan Runke.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we learn how Kimmy Fasani stepped away from the contest scene and into backcountry snowboarding with help from shred legend Devun Walsh and innovator Iikka Backstrom. Featuring Chris Benchetler, Devun Walsh, Adam Moran, Bryan Knox and Peter Morning.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 03
programme.desc: As a Burton athlete, Kimmy Fasani has long been a champion of change in women's snowboarding. Innovative products. Fair pay. Better contracts. Sick ripping. Watch and be uplifted. Featuring Hana Beaman, Pat Bridges, Danny Davis, Gabe Taylor, Kevin Pearce, Bryan Knox, Adam Moran and Peter Morning.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: Discovering Karpathos - Part 2
programme.desc: We take a stroll down the village of Arkansa, in the middle of Karpathos. The village is loved by tourists who have been coming for over 20 years. Then, we are going to explore some of the ruins of the island, starting in the north in the ancient Vrikous. The island is filled with Ancient Greek ruins we cannot miss on before boarding on a windsurf experience. With the Meltemi wind, Karpathos has become a windsurfing paradise.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this fifth episode of Maxiboat, spotlight is on the new products from Dufour Yachts, including the arrival of the Dufour 61 and Dufour 470. Then, we will perform complete trial of the new Sunseeker 55 EVO, an open yacht from the UK. Luxury is once again with the latest models from the Italian shipyard Riva: Folgore 88', Dolce Riva, or the 68' Diable, and we are ready to grasp some action of the first images.Lastly, we will discover a not-so-well known profession at the Moana Yachting based in Cannes, on the French Riviera.

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 8
programme.desc: We are sailing through Iraklia, one of the islands that make up the Cyclades in Greece. Our captain Deanna, skipper Giorgio, Dulce and Maria will take a nice swim in the harbour before exploring the island's caves. Are you coming with us?

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E07 - S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: In 1968, a new form of military policing was being developed in a rural area north of Los Angeles. The Los Angeles Police Department sent an observer to this unit, and he, in turn, took this knowledge back to the LAPD. This contributed to the development of the department’s first Special Weapons and Tactics (S.W.A.T.) team. This CQB episode takes an historical journey to examine how this incident affected and changed police tactics around the world. Using CQB’s trademark “sub-second” analysis, the program also looks at how police S.W.A.T. teams train, plan and equip themselves for the challenges of urban combat. The dramatization of a 1980s S.W.A.T. siege of a gang safe-house demonstrates the complicated challenge of protecting innocent people who might be caught in the line of fi re, as well as the specifics of the squad’s training regimen, how they communicated, and the special equipment they used.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E08 - Hunting Sarajevo Snipers
programme.desc: The Bosnian War was an extraordinarily complex event, with many layers of military involvement including NATO forces, national militaries, irregular paramilitary forces, mujahedeen revolutionaries, private security companies, and international intelligence personnel. One tactic in particular struck fear into the hearts of the military and civilians alike: the use of snipers positioned in high buildings. This edition of CQB investigates this specific combat technique and how it was countered by opposing forces. Taking viewers inside a “sniper‘s den,” the program explains how this tactic was so successfully used by rebel forces – and how traditional military techniques evolved to combat it.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E03 - Bear In Focus

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E18 - The Queen Mother An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: The Queen Mother, who lived as long as the century itself, was a beloved figure in British life. She was a symbol of bravery during the Second World War and a timeless icon of steadiness, winning a deep affection from people that was only matched by the Queen herself.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you’ve been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn’t give a test without a lesson first, so if He’s calling you to let go of something, you can trust He’s already provided you with what you’ll need to take that step.

programme.title: All Those Times You Didn’t See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one’s watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn’t mean He’s ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: Elevation Church Live
programme.desc: Welcome to Elevation Church. See what God can do through you.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You
programme.desc: Right when you start to feel some positive momentum in your life, an attack comes out of nowhere. Sound familiar? Pastor Steven uses the parable of the seeds to illustrate what to do when the enemy attacks and how to persevere in your purpose.

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From
programme.desc: Feeling like you don’t have enough? God has given you an inheritance, so don’t let pressure shrink your perspective or make you forget who you are. The God who brought you this far is more than capable of driving out what’s in your way.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone
programme.desc: Pastor Steven shares a simple truth that can help you endure life’s hardest trials. True security isn't the absence of trouble; it’s the presence of a Savior who promises you’ll never walk through it alone.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Responding to Israel's call, Clara Inés and Raúl become tense as they do not know what truth the man wants to talk to them about.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana manages to take Tatianita away while Carlos Raul is left confronting the criminals to defend his mother.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul is surprised when Ninoska appears before him with a child he claims to be his son.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Celso, unhinged, watches and mocks Fausto, who shoots at his lover's chest, who falls instantly. Fausto goes to his office, telling everyone that nothing happened. Camila, at the scene, tries to convince Patricia to flee because everything indicates that she is Celso's murderer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia, crying, denies having killed Celso. Fausto manipulates the children into believing that their mother is the killer and must turn herself in. Camila eloquently presents her version of events and then tells Ezequiel that he lied to make Patricia pay for a crime she didn't commit, just like they did with their mother.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Victoria Guanipa and Nicolás Del Casal say goodbye with an embrace after spending the night together sheltering from a strong storm when they are surprised by Florencia de Del Casal, who complains to her husband about his closeness with Victoria. Genara demands Hilario Guanipa to tell her where his wife Adelaida is, because she knows that he took her by force from their house. Florencia asks her husband to tell her what happened between him and Victoria while they were sheltering from the rain; although he assures her that he did not betray her, he considers that the best thing for them is to separate; however, she is not willing to give him a divorce. Hilario is told that something happened with Carlos Hansen and immediately goes to the town hospital to find out what happened; Felipe tells him that they had a traffic accident and that his boss had to be transferred to the capital because his condition is very delicate. Hilario takes Adelaida to his house; there Felipe, in front of Victoria and Genara, informs the lady that Hansen had an accident; Adelaida fears a misfortune.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: In front of Hilario Guanipa, his daughter Victoria and Genara, Felipe Osuna informs Adelaida de Guanipa that Carlos Hansen suffered an accident, but is still alive; the young Osuna wants to give the lady a message that his boss sent him before what happened, but the woman, stunned, runs out of her house without listening to him; Hilario orders everyone to leave him alone. Feeling guilty, Adelaida cries inconsolably, believing her beloved Hansen in danger of death, when the man appears before her safe and sound, explaining that it was all a trap he set up to distract Hilario's vigilance and get her out of the hacienda. Fernanda de Alcoy warns Florencia that she has almost everything squared for what they are going to do against Victoria; Fernanda, who found out that Victoria threw her father out of her house, warns Florencia that they must take advantage of this opportunity to carry out their plan against the young Guanipa and that all the blame will fall on Hilario; the young Mrs. Del Casal asks her aunt-in-law to give her two days to prepare for the event.

programme.title: 100% EN FORMA
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila se defiende fieramente de la agresión de Roberto y le cuenta a Max lo sucedido. La Madre Isabel, para ayudar a Camila, le confía a Ezequiel el motivo por el que Roberto la extorsiona. Max presiona a Camila para que le cuente toda la verdad.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: La Mujer que Hablaba con Los Muertos
programme.desc: Es un film de Terror. Cuando Elena Castaño era una niña, tenía un don: era capaz de comunicarse con los espíritus de los muertos. pero esa capacidad desapareció al crecer.

programme.title: Aquel Septiembre
programme.desc: En "Septiembre" la vida de Antonio se ve sacudida con el regreso de Carolina, su mejor amigo a quien no ve desde hace 6 años. Esta vez sus planes cambian, el amor comienza a juega con su corazón mientras Julián le hace descubrir los celos que nunca pensó encontraría. Carolina encuentra en Antonio a su mejor confidente y desahogo, sin sabiendo el daño que le hace al decirle todo lo que siente por Julián y hablando con él sobre su confusión por enamorarse de un amigo. Y es que pobre Antonio está enamorado de Carolina, su mejor amiga.

programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: Er Relajo Del Loro
programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
